goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'the gandhi'.
Make sure you get 'price range'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'cherry hinton water play'.
Make sure you get 'address', 'postcode', and 'area'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
